site.name: AI Sales Dashboard Pro
site.description: An AI-powered sales dashboard for managing leads, conversations, campaigns, and voice calls.
site.tech_stack: Next.js (React), dark theme UI with CSS variables

sidebar.description: Left sidebar with main navigation links. Always visible.

items.label: Dashboard
items.description: Overview with stats cards, leads by status, pipeline table

items.label: Leads
items.description: Leads table with filtering, manual add, CSV upload, outreach actions

items.label: Conversations
items.description: Email conversations with leads, AI-generated replies

items.label: Voice Calls
items.description: Voice call management for converted customers

items.label: Campaigns
items.description: Email campaign management — create, preview, send

items.label: Settings
items.description: AI system prompt and scoring rules configuration

dashboard.description: Main dashboard with stat cards and pipeline activity table
readable_data: Recent Pipeline Activity table (lead name, email, score, status, message count)

leads.description: Leads management page with table of all leads

add_manually.description: Opens a modal to add a single lead manually
add_manually.trigger: Click the '+ Add Manually' button in the top-right area

modal.title: Add Lead Manually
modal.success_indicator: Alert dialog saying 'Lead added successfully! It is now in the pipeline.'
modal.post_submit_behavior: Shows browser alert, then modal closes and leads table refreshes

upload_csv.description: Upload a CSV file to bulk-import leads

filter_by_status.description: Filter leads by status using dropdown

start_outreach.description: Start AI outreach for a single lead
start_outreach.trigger: Click the 'Contact' button next to a lead row (only visible for 'enriched' or 'new' status leads)
start_outreach.confirmation: Browser confirm dialog asking 'Start outreach for {email}? An AI email will be sent.'

contact_all.description: Start outreach for all enriched leads at once
contact_all.trigger: Click 'Contact All (N)' button (only visible when enriched leads exist)

conversations.description: View and manage email conversations with leads

view_conversation.description: Click on a conversation row to see message thread
view_conversation.trigger: Click any conversation in the list

simulate_reply.description: Type a simulated customer reply to test AI response
simulate_reply.trigger: Type in the reply input field and click Send

send_campaign.trigger: Click 'Send' button on a draft campaign

voice_calls.description: Make AI-powered voice calls to converted customers

initiate_call.description: Start a voice call to a customer
initiate_call.trigger: Click 'Call' button next to a customer

direct_call.trigger: Enter phone number and name, click 'Call'

settings.description: Configure AI behavior and scoring rules

update_prompt.trigger: Edit the text area and click 'Save Prompt'

update_rules.description: Update scoring rules (seniority keywords, industries, thresholds)
update_rules.trigger: Modify the fields and click 'Save Rules'
